summary: Publish verified stack and template revisions in dependency order

evidence.summary: Stack feature revision eae9a178 pushed before template feature revision 94a9d180; workflow revisions stack 14baaa85 and template 163efde9 match origin/main; fresh remote clones validate and pair cleanly; 46 tests plus both make checks pass on Debian Python 3.12; actionlint and shellcheck pass; GitHub dispatch is externally unavailable because Actions is disabled for this user.
